overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player navigates from a downtown intersection with towering futuristic skyscrapers through residential and industrial areas, passing a gas station and security checkpoint under bright desert sunlight.

turning left onto sidewalk while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection and turning left onto the sidewalk

scattered palm trees lining the street
overhead traffic signal structure spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: Starting at a downtown intersection dominated by the towering 07 skyscraper and a 24/7 store sign. The player crosses the asphalt crosswalk, passing pedestrians and turning left onto the sidewalk under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with distinctive blue house

events.description: passing from commercial downtown to residential area with blue house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the blue house

metal trash containers on the sidewalk near the house
arid mountain range visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk past a distinctive blue two-story house with a front porch and stairs. The area transitions from dense urban core to a more residential zone with dry grass and desert mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with parked vehicles and construction

events.description: passing large green dumpster and trash bags accumulated on sidewalk
approaching gas station with large concrete canopy structure

agents.ego_description: walking past parked vehicles and industrial debris along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: orange muscle car driving past on the street

entered.detail: large industrial trash container overflowing with plastic bags
abandoned dark-colored sedan parked on the sidewalk edge
stacks of vehicle tires near chain-link fence
large concrete and metal gas station roof structure
yellow construction cranes on unfinished building

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past industrial elements including a green dumpster, abandoned sedan, and tire piles. The gas station canopy becomes visible in the distance as vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station and security checkpoint area

events.description: passing security booth with concrete barriers and yellow markings
approaching group of pedestrians near intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the gas station and security checkpoint toward pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: small concrete guard station with windows and yellow safety barriers
yellow and white striped road blocks near the booth
tall modern street lights with orange glowing fixtures

segments.scene_description: Walking past a gas station canopy and a security checkpoint with concrete barriers. The scene opens up with more pedestrians visible ahead, and the unfinished construction site with cranes dominates the left side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dense, futuristic downtown intersection into a sprawling industrial and residential outskirts zone. It begins at a busy crosswalk dominated by the towering 07 skyscraper and a 24/7 store sign, moving past pedestrians under the bright midday sun. As the camera turns left and follows the concrete sidewalk, the urban core gives way to a residential area featuring a blue two-story house and a backdrop of dry grass and distant desert mountains. The scene then shifts toward an industrial landscape, passing a green dumpster and abandoned sedan before the canopy of a gas station emerges in the distance. Finally, the path leads past a security checkpoint with concrete barriers, opening up to a wider view of pedestrians and a massive construction site with towering cranes.
